latest.title: Fossils turn old bones into time clues

latest.title: Lava turns seawater into boiling rock
latest.script_key: new land in 30 seconds watch that red river hit the water it doesn t just cool it explodes the lava s outer crust hardens fast that s why it looks like glass shards popping off that steam cloud isn t just steam it s superheated salt and minerals blasting out would you walk on this in an hour

latest.title: Lava waterfalls build land faster than you think
latest.script_key: lava waterfalls like pamukkale don t just look cool they pour calcium rich water that hardens into solid terraces that s why the pools stack up faster than you d think up to 13 centimeters a year see how the water glows blue under sunlight that s not magic it s the way light bends through minerals

latest.title: Bears smell food from miles away
latest.script_key: bears can smell a meal long before seeing it watch the nose first because smell drives many bear decisions before the eyes do that huge scent map helps them find food avoid danger and read who crossed the area earlier would you trust your nose that much

latest.title: Hedgehogs aren't just cute they're silent alarms
latest.script_key: this tiny alarm walks barefoot those spines aren t decoration they re built like silent tripwires each spine s tip has a special muscle that locks it straight when touched that s why you ll never hear a hedgehog squeak until it s too late did you think they were just prickly pets

latest.title: Snakes sample the air with a tongue flick
latest.script_key: snakes sample the air with a tongue flick watch the tongue flick because it collects scent particles and sends them to a special organ in the mouth that helps snakes track prey mates and danger without needing a loud chase the air is information would you notice the trail

latest.title: Rivers carve bends by stealing from one bank
latest.script_key: rivers move sideways while they flow watch the outside of the bend because faster water cuts that bank while slower water drops sediment inside the curve over time the whole river shifts across the landscape a bend is motion written in mud which water shape next now the river bend at the start makes sense

latest.title: Rivers carry stone grains while they flow
